name: standalone-miner
description: XENTurbo XEN Miner - pure frontend batch miner, no backend, no database. All state derived from on-chain data.

scripts.format:check: prettier --check package.json package-lock.json README.md eslint.config.mjs vite.config.ts .github/workflows/*.yml scripts/*.mjs tests/verifyCreate2.test.ts tests/checkBundleSize.test.ts tests/checkRpcHealth.test.ts
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run test:coverage && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run check:bundle && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org && playwright test
